channel.title: War on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in War on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: Wasteland
item.description: They wandered the wasteland through ruined counties and barren states asking the same question again and again. “We prayed, we were righteous and God was on our side so how did we lose the war?”

item.title: Caught
item.description: We crawled for what must have been miles through mud, thorn-laden bush, beds of razor-sharp rock and freezing streams but still the bastards caught us. Then came the torture and the screaming.
